compliance_rules.safe_indicator: Personnel movement remains within the boundaries of the green-marked Designated Safe Walkway.
compliance_rules.unsafe_indicator: A person moves or is present outside the boundaries of the green-marked Designated Safe Walkway.
observable_signals: Person detected outside green walkway markings
Person position beyond green walkway boundaries
Presence in machinery or vehicle operation zone
compliance_rules.hazard_description: Deviation from the walkway places personnel in proximity to forklift and machinery hazards.
compliance_rules.escalation_language: will be treated as an unsafe behavior event requiring immediate response

escalation_conditions.condition: person detected outside green-marked walkway boundaries
escalation_conditions.rationale: Exposure to forklift and machinery hazards outside designated pedestrian zone

compliance_rules.safe_indicator: Person interacts with production equipment while wearing the designated green safety vest and required safety equipment.
compliance_rules.unsafe_indicator: Person interacts with or adjusts production equipment without the designated green safety vest and/or without required safety equipment.
observable_signals: Red-black vest while interacting with equipment
Any non-green vest while interacting with equipment
compliance_rules.hazard_description: Unauthorized interaction with equipment creates risk of injury to the individual and others and may disrupt production processes.
compliance_rules.escalation_language: Any person seen interacting with equipment who is not wearing the green vest must be assumed to be performing an Unauthorized Intervention.

escalation_conditions.condition: person interacting with equipment without green vest
escalation_conditions.rationale: Green vest is the primary observable indicator of authorization

escalation_conditions.condition: person interacting with equipment without required safety equipment
person intervening without observable authorization indicators

compliance_rules.safe_indicator: Electrical panel cover connected to a production machine is fully closed.
compliance_rules.unsafe_indicator: Electrical panel cover connected to a production machine is left in the open position.
observable_signals: Electrical panel in open-cover state during production operations
compliance_rules.hazard_description: Open panel covers remove the protective barrier between personnel and electrical components.
compliance_rules.escalation_language: The automated detection system monitors panel cover status continuously and will generate an alert whenever an open-cover condition is observed.

escalation_conditions.condition: panel cover observed open during production operations
escalation_conditions.rationale: Unsafe condition regardless of duration or personnel proximity

compliance_rules.safe_indicator: Forklift carries two (2) or fewer standardized blocks in a single load.
compliance_rules.unsafe_indicator: Forklift carries three (3) or more standardized blocks in a single load.
observable_signals: Three or more blocks on forklift forks
Forklift traveling with overloaded block count
Forklift maneuvering with three or more blocks
Forklift loading/unloading with three or more blocks
compliance_rules.hazard_description: Overloaded forklift operation creates risks associated with vehicle instability.
compliance_rules.escalation_language: Any observed forklift load of three or more standardized blocks will be treated as a Carrying Overload with Forklift event and will trigger an immediate alert.

escalation_conditions.rationale: Policy defines three or more blocks as an overload with immediate alert requirement
